meaning: n.山顶,顶点,帽舌,(记录的)最高峰adj.最高的vi.到达最高点,消瘦,缩小vt.使竖起,使达到最高点
examples: She's at the peak of her career.
It's always crowded at peak times.
Phone calls cost 20c per unit off-peak.
Like season tickets, the price of off-peak returns has been capped by government since privatisation.
And the only way up, as far as we are concerned, is via the Peak Tram.
